## takumi release

Run release phase for packages

### Synopsis

Run the release phase for one or more packages.
If no packages are specified, runs for all packages that define it.

```
takumi release [packages...] [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --affected   Only run for packages affected by changes
      --dry-run    Show execution plan without running anything
  -h, --help       help for release
      --no-cache   Skip cache and force execution
```
